sources.name: FSA Japan Laws & Guidelines catalog (Japanese primary portal)
sources.authority: Financial Services Agency of Japan (金融庁)
sources.completeness_note: Top-level catalogue; section-level inspection items (Ⅱ-1-1, 別紙) stored at framework granularity in current ingest.

sources.name: FSA Japan Supervisory Guidelines & Inspection Manuals (English portal)
sources.authority: Financial Services Agency of Japan (金融庁)
sources.completeness_note: Subset of Japanese-only content. English translations published by FSA can lag Japanese releases by 1–6 months.

supervisory_guidelines.description: Comprehensive Guidelines for Supervision of Major Banks, Insurance, and Securities

cyber_security_2024.description: FSA Cyber Security Guidelines 2024 for Japanese financial institutions

aml_cft.description: Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorism Financing Guidelines

inspection_manual.description: Comprehensive Inspection Manual covering credit/market/liquidity/operational risk, IT systems, customer protection

bilingual_pair_matching_note: Japanese and English versions of the same FSA document are currently treated as independent rows. Cross-language title canonicalisation is planned for 0.2.0.
notes: This MCP provides supervisory guidance and inspection standards, not primary legislation. Statute text should be retrieved from a law MCP (out of scope here).
FSA regulations are subject to change; confirm currency with jp_fsa_check_data_freshness before reliance.
The Japanese text is the authoritative regulatory version; English translations are official but may lag.
